name: ETH Value Reacceptance Exhaustion v1
edge_mechanism: exhaustion reversal only after structure reaccepts prior value
thesis: ETH 4h is the cleaner lane for a constrained exhaustion-reacceptance idea. This is not blind mean reversion; it only engages after a failed extension structurally returns to value.
invalidation_condition: Abort if exhaustion-plus-reacceptance remains too sparse again, if reversals fail to travel after reacceptance, or if the regime is too trend-persistent for reversal logic.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: A stretched move loses momentum, value is reaccepted, and price mean reverts enough to monetize the failure of extension.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: When trend confidence is weak and chop dominates the 20-bar mix, failed extensions into reaccepted value can still produce dense repair moves on ETH.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 4h is chosen because it is cleaner than TAO and more reliable for testing whether reacceptance logic can be made broad enough to trade.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: This family has historically risked density collapse; if reacceptance is still too ceremonial, it will zero-trade or produce thin mirages again.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If density exists but the repair move is too small, tighten exits before adding more confirmation layers.
pre_submit_reasoning.expected_trade_density: Moderate if the broad reacceptance expression works; otherwise structurally too low.
pre_submit_reasoning.expected_outcome_pattern: High-ish win rate but smaller average win than continuation ideas, with expectancy dependent on dense participation.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_success: Trades appear on ETH and at least one cross-lane with real density and no low-trade mirage profile.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_failure: 0 trades, low-trade PF illusion, or immediate collapse back into the prior extension direction.

density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: explicitly broadened to avoid prior ceremonial grammar

test_lanes.why_included: Cleanest lane for determining whether this formerly sparse family can be rehabilitated structurally.
test_lanes.continue_if: Density is real and reversals travel enough after costs.
test_lanes.rotate_away_if: It zero-trades or produces another low-trade mirage.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Broad failed extensions should revert toward value with enough frequency to matter.

test_lanes.why_included: Checks whether the same reacceptance logic breaks under higher-beta volatility.
test_lanes.continue_if: TAO shows similar structure without degenerating into chaos.
test_lanes.rotate_away_if: Only ETH works and TAO fully breaks the thesis.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Bigger reversals but more variance than ETH.

test_lanes.why_included: Tests whether the family is structural or too fragile for thinner assets.
test_lanes.continue_if: The mechanism survives with acceptable density.
test_lanes.rotate_away_if: Noise dominates and no orderly reacceptance appears.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Less clean than ETH but still tradable failed extensions into balance repair.

long: Exit remaining 20% on close through EMA_55 or 4 bars
short: Exit remaining 20% on close through EMA_55 or 4 bars
